description: Bill of debt issued in Cairo in 1509/10 CE (5270 AM) to be paid to David Di Medina and his brother Avraham in 10 Ducati every week. The debtors are Yisef Hakohen, Shemuel Ibn Sahl and Yosef Halevi known as Miron. (info from FGP)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
